title: ERC721AI Metadata
description: JSON metadata schema for ERC721AI tokenURI – describes an AI model's weights provenance.

name.description: Human-readable name for the model (e.g. "ResNet-50 fine-tune v3").

description.description: Free-text description of the model, its purpose, and training details.

model_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the model weights file.

storage_cid.description: IPFS CID (v0 or v1) where the model weights are stored.

arweave_txn.description: Arweave transaction ID for permanent storage (optional).

training_dataset_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the training dataset.

external_url.description: Optional link to a project page or model card.
